THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODLIEF, ANITRA $1,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
